ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the poster image */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Path to the backdrop image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDB ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Whether this is the primary genre for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Whether this is the primary director for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the cast member */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the cast member */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the cast member (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "is_lead" INTEGER /* Whether this is a lead role for the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 10) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, analyst, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
